name: Stepper
description: Multi-step progress indicator for workflows. Includes Stepper for step-by-step navigation, LinearStepper for progress bars, and SegmentedStepper for segmented progress.

steps.description: Array of step items: { title: string, description?: string, status?: StepStatus, icon?: ReactNode }

activeStep.description: Current active step index (0-based). Overrides individual step statuses.

indicator.description: Indicator style inside the step circle

subComponents.name: LinearStepper
subComponents.description: Simple linear progress bar showing step completion

showLabel.description: Show the step counter label (e.g., '2 / 5 complete')

subComponents.name: SegmentedStepper
subComponents.description: Segmented progress bar with individual step segments

accessibility.screenReaderNotes: Step indicators visually communicate progress through color and icons

commonMistakes.correction: Stepper is display-only; manage step state yourself
Stepper doesn't support click navigation; use Tabs or custom buttons
Use steps array prop with { title, description }

examples.title: Horizontal Stepper
examples.code:
<Stepper
  steps={[
    { title: 'Account' },
    { title: 'Profile' },
    { title: 'Review' },
    { title: 'Complete' },
  ]}
  activeStep={1}
/>

examples.title: Vertical Stepper with Descriptions
examples.code:
<Stepper
  orientation="vertical"
  steps={[
    { title: 'Create Account', description: 'Set up your credentials' },
    { title: 'Add Profile', description: 'Tell us about yourself' },
    { title: 'Verify Email', description: 'Confirm your email address' },
  ]}
  activeStep={1}
/>

examples.title: Number Indicator
examples.code:
<Stepper
  steps={[
    { title: 'Step 1' },
    { title: 'Step 2' },
    { title: 'Step 3' },
  ]}
  activeStep={0}
  indicator="number"
/>

examples.title: Manual Step Status
examples.code:
<Stepper
  steps={[
    { title: 'Cart', status: 'completed' },
    { title: 'Shipping', status: 'active' },
    { title: 'Payment', status: 'incomplete' },
    { title: 'Confirm', status: 'disabled' },
  ]}
/>

examples.title: With Custom Icons
examples.code:
<Stepper
  indicator="icon"
  steps={[
    { title: 'Upload', icon: <Icon name="upload" size="xs" /> },
    { title: 'Process', icon: <Icon name="settings" size="xs" /> },
    { title: 'Complete', icon: <Icon name="check" size="xs" /> },
  ]}
  activeStep={1}
/>
